locations.description: Plan title block with version, date, and generator.
Section 1 listing goal, high-level requirements, and key assumptions.
Project scale classification rationale referencing Large category.
Core architecture summary, technology stack, components, data models, APIs, and communication patterns.
List of diagrams/specifications to be produced with iteration references.
Proposed repository tree with annotations for documentation and artifacts.
Process guardrails covering command discipline, approvals, determinism, rate limits, security, traceability, and docs.
Section summarizing total iterations and dependencies.
Iteration 1 introduction with goals, prerequisites, deliverables, risks, and checklist.
Task I1.T1 scaffolds the oclif CLI, tooling, and Dockerfile.
Task I1.T2 defines RepoConfig schema, validator, and templates.
Task I1.T3 builds run directory manager, hash manifest, and schema docs.
Task I1.T4 creates rate-limit aware HTTP client and ledger utilities.
Task I1.T5 drafts the component diagram and commentary.
Task I1.T6 sets up logging, metrics, tracing, and observability docs.
Task I1.T7 formalizes data models, ERD, and dictionaries.
Task I1.T8 implements `codepipe init/doctor` and readiness checklist.
Iteration 2 overview covering context intelligence and spec workflows.
Task I2.T1 builds the context aggregator and manifest doc.
Task I2.T2 adds summarization pipeline and cost telemetry.
Task I2.T3 implements ResearchTask coordinator and sequence diagram.
Task I2.T4 delivers PRD template, authoring engine, and approvals playbook.
Task I2.T5 builds specification composer and blueprint diagram.
Task I2.T6 designs approval UX, registry, and CLI command.
Task I2.T7 implements traceability map generator and doc.
Task I2.T8 introduces agent manifest loader, schema, and guide.
Iteration 3 overview for execution engine and validation work.
Task I3.T1 upgrades task planner and produces execution flow diagram.
Task I3.T2 implements patch and branch management.
Task I3.T3 creates validation registry, auto-fix engine, and CLI validate.
Task I3.T4 finalizes agent adapter contract and capability schema.
Task I3.T5 hardens resume coordinator and queue persistence.
Task I3.T6 instruments execution telemetry and metrics.
Task I3.T7 enhances CLI plan/status/resume outputs.
Task I3.T8 adds end-to-end execution smoke tests and scripts.
Iteration 4 overview for GitHub/Linear integrations and PR automation.
Task I4.T1 builds GitHub adapter and updates OpenAPI spec.
Task I4.T2 creates Linear MCP adapter with offline fallback.
Task I4.T3 enhances rate-limit telemetry and CLI reporting.
Task I4.T4 delivers PR CLI commands and automation sequence diagram.
Task I4.T5 implements branch protection intelligence module.
Task I4.T6 integrates GitHub/Linear state into status/resume outputs.
Task I4.T7 adds write action queue for throttled GitHub writes.
Task I4.T8 delivers integration regression tests and fixture tooling.
Iteration 5 overview for deployment, export, observe, cleanup, and ops docs.
Task I5.T1 implements deployment trigger module and state diagram.
Task I5.T2 builds export bundler, CLI command, and schema.
Task I5.T3 adds observe command and operations playbook.
Task I5.T4 implements cleanup command and retention policy doc.
Task I5.T5 creates deploy/resume integration tests and smoke script.
Task I5.T6 delivers notification adapter skeleton and guide.
Task I5.T7 updates verification strategy, security, and compliance docs.
Task I5.T8 refreshes glossary, UI docs, and design tokens.
Heading introducing Verification and Integration Strategy with all subsections.
Subsection outlining unit, integration, e2e, contract, and CLI snapshot tests.
CI/CD pipeline expectations, stages, environments, secrets, and artifacts.
Code quality gates covering linting, coverage, security scans, rate-limit budgets, and performance.
Artifact validation plan for run directories, PRD/spec/plan, export schema, diagrams, and ledgers.
Risk mitigation strategies for rate limits, approvals, resume, security, and incident logging.
Readiness checklist summarizing smoke tests, docs, exports, observability, and manifest updates.
Tooling and evidence capture requirements for logs, metrics, traces, bundles, and automation hooks.
Release approval and change-control process with sign-off expectations.
Environmental health checks via doctor/init/observe to ensure readiness.
Glossary entries covering adapters, approvals, bundles, telemetry, and operational concepts.
